title: Inventory and Sales Support Assistant
description:
Lasertec Corporation provides various inspection and measurement solutions based on its expertise in applied optical technologies. Guided by the corporate philosophy of “Inventing for your success, inventing for the future”, our specialisation is in semiconductor-related inspection systems, and we strive to achieve further growth in the semiconductor industry where innovations keep driving market growth, by developing perfectly fit products to meet customer needs ahead of others.

As a subsidiary, Lasertec Singapore supports our customers’ needs with maintenance service for the mask blanks inspection machines.

We are currently seeking an Inventory and Sales Support Assistant to join our team.

In this role, your responsibilities are to:

  •  Plan the purchasing of parts, following the regulations of HQ in Japan.
  •  Liaise and discuss with HQ in Japan to clarify the purchasing plan rules.
  •  Ensure that the daily operations comply with the company regulations.
  •  Report any issues or risks relevant to inventory control operations.
  •  Maintain updated and accurate records of inventory (accurately record the quality, quantity, functional life, and any other status of the inventory conditions)
  •  Conduct month-end stock stakes.
  •  Liaise with forwarders, arranging deliveries to customers, prepare items and documentation for delivery.
  •  Assist in the management of measuring instruments which are kept in office.
  •  Assist in laser related license application.
  • Support the preparation of sales quotations.
  • Update order status promptly after receiving purchase orders.

This role requires you to:

  •  Have at least 1-2 years of related work experience or have knowledge in inventory control.
  •  Have basic proficiency in Microsoft OfficeExcel, Words.

We are looking for someone who is:

  • Meticulous.
  • A team player.
  • Has strong interpersonal skills with good oral and written communication skills.


We look forward to receiving your application. For more information about Lasertec Group, please visit https://www.lasertec.co.jp/en/.

postedCompany.description:
Based in Japan, Lasertec Corporation, a R&D-oriented fab-lite enterprise, has been providing various inspection and measurement solutions based on its expertise in applied optical technologies, guided by the corporate philosophy, "Inventing for your success, inventing for the future”, We specialize in semiconductor-related inspection systems, and we strive to achieve further growth in the semiconductor industry, where innovations keep driving market growth, by developing perfectly fit products to meet customer needs ahead of anyone else.


At Lasertec Singapore, we support our customer’s needs with maintenance services for our cutting-edge mask inspection machines.
